fields.label: Max Weight (KG)
fields.description: Upper bound of this weight slab in KG (e.g. 0.5, 1, 2, ... 70)

fields.label: Rate
fields.description: Shipping rate for this slab (or per-KG rate if is_per_kg_above_max is checked)

fields.label: Per-KG Rate (71+ KG)
fields.description: If checked, this row defines the per-KG surcharge for shipments above the maximum normal slab
